items.name: php-dup-finder
items.description: AST-based PHP duplicate-logic detector and refactoring assistant. Finds parameterizable duplication via canonicalization, n-gram fingerprinting, bounded tree-edit-distance, and anti-unification — proposes extract-function signatures with typed parameter holes. CLI, JSON, and static-HTML reports.
